12174186700000011



SELECT 
    mast_sip_contr_id,
    FROM_UNIXTIME(sip_date) AS sip_date_converted
FROM pops_contribution_details_cycle
WHERE mast_sip_contr_id IN (657, 706, 798, 809, 419, 420, 432, 439, 447, 886, 580, 404);
